name: Fujian Forecam Optics Co., Ltd.
summary: Fujian Forecam Optics Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells optical lenses for civilian applications in the People's Republic of China. It offers board mount, CS mount, and special photoelectric lenses, as well as pan-tilt systems for use in optical glasses, CCTV lenses, DSC lenses, and FA machine vision lenses. The company is based in Fuzhou, the People's Republic of China.
